case_title: DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY VS. CARLOS BOOKER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY SERVED JAN-28-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, CARLOS AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2004 CONTINUED TO AUG-18-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JUL-07-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
